mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_offline_order_yue ( order_id, NAME, certificates, certificates_type, phone, district_name, group_id, group_name, code_id, code_name, staff_Id, staff_name, is_status, is_status_code, scheduling_date, scheduling_type, money, treatment_type, treatment_name, decision_time, about_id, yue_time, yue_id, time, floor, booking_id, district_id ) VALUES (#{oderYue.orderId},#{oderYue.name},#{oderYue.certificates},#{oderYue.certificatesType},#{oderYue.phone},#{oderYue.districtName},#{oderYue.groupId},#{oderYue.groupName},#{oderYue.codeId},#{oderYue.codeName},#{oderYue.staffId},#{oderYue.staffName}, #{oderYue.isStatus},#{oderYue.isStatus},#{oderYue.schedulingDate},#{oderYue.schedulingType},#{oderYue.money},#{oderYue.treatmentType},#{oderYue.treatmentName},#{oderYue.decisionTime},#{oderYue.aboutId}, #{oderYue.yueTime},#{oderYue.yueId},#{oderYue.time},#{oderYue.floor},#{oderYue.bookingId},#{oderYue.districtId})
mapper.select: select node_id,node_name from t_offline_node where node_code = #{nodeCode}
select node_id,pool_id from t_offline_node where node_type = 2
select id from t_offline_order_yue order by create_time desc limit 0,1
SELECT district_id, district_name, district_address FROM t_offline_district WHERE district_name = #{districtName}
